title: IT Network Engineer - Banking
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented IT Network Operations Engineer to ensure the stability, security, and performance of network and infrastructure operations within a leading financial institution. This role offers exposure to enterprise-grade banking systems and requires a strategic approach to problem-solving and operational excellence.

Responsibilities

  • Deliver technical support for daily IT operations, network maintenance, and infrastructure management to sustain optimal system performance
  • Troubleshoot and resolve network and system issues promptly to minimize downtime and maintain continuous service availability
  • Manage and configure user accounts, permissions, and access controls to uphold system integrity and security standards
  • Monitor and support network operations, including TCP/IP, routing, switching, firewalls, DNS, and VPN configurations, to ensure reliable connectivity and security
  • Participate in a monthly standby rotation, responding effectively to urgent network matters during standby periods without shift work requirements (Note: This is a regular Monday–Friday, 9am–6pm position. No shift work required. The team only rotates standby duty monthly, and you only handle urgent matters if anything arises.)
  • Provide technical inputs and collaborate with audit teams to support IT audit activities and address identified compliance gaps
  • Assist with ad hoc technical tasks and projects as assigned by the Department Head, contributing to continuous improvement initiatives

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field
  • Solid understanding of networking fundamentals with hands-on operational experience
  • Experience working in a banking or financial institution environment
  • Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to learn quickly and work autonomously as well as collaboratively in a team environment
  • Proficiency in English and Mandarin to effectively communicate with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders, supporting cross-functional collaboration

Other Information

  • Location: Singapore
  • Employment Type: Permanent
  • Industry: Banking & Financial Services

postedCompany.description:
At GreenLane Talent Acquisition, we redefine the recruitment experience for both clients and job seekers. As a leading talent acquisition partner, we specialize in connecting top-tier professionals with leading companies. Our comprehensive approach covers everything from precise position identification to seamless onboarding, ensuring a perfect fit for both employers and candidates.


For job seekers, GreenLane is more than a recruitment agency; we are your career advocate. Our team is dedicated to understanding your unique skills, aspirations, and preferences, guiding you towards opportunities that align with your career goals. We believe in the transformative power of exceptional talent, and we are here to support you in achieving your professional ambitions.


Whether you are an employer seeking top talent or a job seeker looking for the next career move, GreenLane Talent Acquisition is your trusted partner on the journey to success.
postedCompany.name: GREENLANE PRIVATE LTD.
